note: A starter bestiary across the four Realms + mundane beasts. A creature's Might (Realm) equals its Magic Resistance and fuels level-less powers from a Might Pool. Stat further foes on the fly with `arm.py npc might` and the NPC Statistics Table.

elements.name: Wolf
elements.summary: A pack predator of erect ears and narrow muzzle, feared across Mythic Europe.
elements.powers: Ferocity when hungry; Sharp Ears; Pack Leader.
elements.wants: Hunts livestock and the lone traveller; the wanton killer of folklore.

elements.name: Bear
elements.summary: A large shaggy forest beast up to 700 pounds, from the Pyrenees to Russia.
elements.powers: Ferocity when injured; Tough; claws and teeth.
elements.wants: Forages and hunts; territorial and deadly when wounded or guarding cubs.

elements.name: Lion
elements.summary: A legendary apex predator with dark mane and fearsome roar.
elements.powers: Ferocity; Puissant Brawl; large claws and teeth.
elements.wants: Hunts large game; bold lions attack men, timid ones avoid them.

elements.name: Ghostly Warder
elements.summary: The non-physical spirit of a dead woman bound to a place, maternal toward her charges.
elements.powers: Kinesis (moves objects); non-physical, immune to mundane harm.
elements.wants: Protects children and household; gives motherly counsel from her living memory.

elements.name: A Magical Wolf
elements.summary: A grey wolf, larger than kin, eyes sparkling, warden of all wolves in its range.
elements.powers: Pack of One (5 duplicates); Terrifying Howl; Wolf Lord (mundane wolves die at its will).
elements.wants: Guards the health of wild packs; may parley with villages over hunting rights — on its own terms.

elements.name: Sir Giles, a Ghostly Knight
elements.summary: A spectral knight in black mail on a phantom steed, bound by overwhelming pride.
elements.powers: Corporeal Veil; Phantom Steed; Invisibility; Ride in Dreams (nightmares).
elements.wants: To make amends to his victim's widow, yet his pride forbids true repentance — so he haunts.

elements.name: Faerie Knight
elements.summary: An armoured faerie clad in silver metal leaves, seeking worthy combat.
elements.powers: Damaging Effect (+5 weapon); Flight; Shift Human Shapes (sheds armour at will).
elements.wants: Guards bridges and lonely roads seeking honourable defeat — playing the chivalric role.

elements.name: Tarlan the Wolf
elements.summary: A deep-black wolf with glinting eyes that hounds lone humans in the wild until they drop.
elements.powers: Marked Quarry (fear); Prey's Vigor (restores its fatigue but ages the prey a year); Silent Running.
elements.wants: Hunts humans for the sport of the chase till dawn; respects the Gift, spares children and holy ground.

elements.name: Baal-Peor, Lord of Filth
elements.summary: A grotesquely fat demon, master of temptation through wealth and filth.
elements.powers: Form of Woman; Noxious Vomit (corrosive); Swallow; The Wealth of Nations (summon riches).
elements.wants: Moves mortal riches to sow discord and damn the greedy; never deals honestly.

elements.name: Bartholomew
elements.summary: A well-placed merchant demon whose counsel enriches followers while corrupting their souls.
elements.powers: Merchant's Blessing/Curse (+3/−3 trade); Merchant's Knowledge; Project Blessing/Curse.
elements.wants: To make merchants sin without noticing — turning even charity selfish.

elements.name: Kolazonta, the Chastiser
elements.summary: A grim angel of punishment manifesting as a dark cloud or white fire.
elements.powers: Chastise the Sinful (plague); Cloud form (immune to physical attack); Fiery Form (+5 nearby).
elements.wants: To execute the Lord's chastisement without fear or favour, awaiting His command.

elements.name: Seferiel
elements.summary: A great angel with golden skin and burning hair, charged with the Hermetic magi.
elements.powers: Magic (duplicates Hermetic effects, 1 Might per 2 magnitudes); Spirit/Subtle Form; Flaming Greatsword.
elements.wants: To draw magi toward God and be His vengeance on the wicked.
